etymology.description: semantic 車(車) (chē, "cart") + phonetic 非(非) (fēi) -> generation
etymology.interpretation: The character 輩(輩) combines the semantic 車(車) (chē, "cart") with the phonetic 非(非) (fēi) to denote the idea of generation. While 車(車) suggests movement or procession, a sense connected to sequential progression or the passage of time, 非(非) provides the phonetic element. The notion of a series of carts can metaphorically relate to successive generations, each following the one before, forming the concept of 'generation' or 'lifetime.'
etymology.simplification: 輩(輩) was simplified to 辈(輩) by reducing 車(車) to the simpler form of 车(车) while retaining the phonetic 非(非) (fēi).

examples.chinese: 年轻一代(年輕一代)正引领科技创新(正引領科技創新)。
examples.pinyin: Niánqīng yī dài zhèng yǐnlǐng kējì chuàngxīn.
examples.english: The younger generation is leading technological innovation.

examples.chinese: 他一生致力于教育事业(他一生致力於教育事業)。
examples.pinyin: Tā yīshēng zhìlì yú jiàoyù shìyè.
examples.english: He dedicated his lifetime to the cause of education.

examples.chinese: 祖辈(祖輩)的智慧对我们影响深远(對我們影響深遠)。
examples.pinyin: Zǔbèi de zhìhuì duì wǒmen yǐngxiǎng shēnyuǎn.
examples.english: The wisdom of the ancestors has a profound influence on us.
